projectDescription: A pure-frontend, privacy-first MBTI-inspired anime persona quiz that matches users to one of 42 ACG characters across 8 personality archetypes.
keyFeatures: 39-question scenario-based quiz with 7-point Likert scale answers
8 distinct ACG personality archetypes mapped from 16 MBTI types
42 character library spanning VOCALOID, EVA, Genshin Impact, MyGO, and more
16personalities-style interactive trait sliders on the result page
One-click PNG poster export for social sharing
Pure frontend architecture — no backend, no registration, no data collection
Multi-language support: zh-CN, zh-TW, English, Japanese
Deployed on Cloudflare Pages with GitHub Actions CI
publicApiSurface: useQuiz() composable — ensureData, finalizeQuiz, resetQuiz, goNext, goPrev, jumpToQuestion
TRAIT_CONFIG — dimension label and color configuration
src/data/questions.json — 39 scenario questions with dimension + archetype weights
src/data/archetypes.json — 8 archetype definitions with vector and metadata
src/data/characters.json — 42 character entries with matchCode, vector, tags
src/data/characterVisuals.json — image paths and accent colors per character
